div.p: ✓ 93%+ reduction for typical batch sizes (100-1000) ✓ Reduced lock contention via single acquisition ✓ Better cache utilization (L1/L2 warmth) ✓ Lower network overhead (1 RTT vs N RTTs)
Recommendation: Prefer batch operations for bulk operations.

ul.li: Statistics update: ~0.01ms Total per request: ~1.18ms N=1000 requests: ~1180ms

div.p: Individual: T_indiv = N × (RTT + lock + process) Batch: T_batch = RTT + lock + (N × process)

ul.li: Individual: Each request suffers L1/L2 cache misses.
Batch: First vectors warm the cache. Subsequent vectors benefit from cache hits.
